'''鈭歸-ch-y''' ('''wachaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cacuminate|cacuminate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ch-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cacuminate|cacuminate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-ch-y
|-
! Lemma
| wachaya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wachayithi|wachayithi]] || [[word:wachayiji|wachayiji]] || [[word:wachayishi|wachayishi]] || [[word:wachayi|wachayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wachayuthuth|wachayuthuth]] || [[word:wachayujuj|wachayujuj]] || [[word:wachayushush|wachayushush]] || [[word:wachay|wachay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wachayuthu|wachayuthu]] || [[word:wachayuju|wachayuju]] || [[word:wachayushu|wachayushu]] || [[word:wachayu|wachayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wachayufuth|wachayufuth]] || [[word:wachayufuj|wachayufuj]] || [[word:wachayufush|wachayufush]] || [[word:wachayuf|wachayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wachayethe|wachayethe]] || [[word:wachayeje|wachayeje]] || [[word:wachayeshe|wachayeshe]] || [[word:wachaye|wachaye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wachayothoth|wachayothoth]] || [[word:wachayojoj|wachayojoj]] || [[word:wachayoshosh|wachayoshosh]] || [[word:wachay|wachay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wachayotho|wachayotho]] || [[word:wachayojo|wachayojo]] || [[word:wachayosho|wachayosho]] || [[word:wachayo|wachayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wachayofoth|wachayofoth]] || [[word:wachayofoj|wachayofoj]] || [[word:wachayofosh|wachayofosh]] || [[word:wachayof|wachayof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wachay忙th忙|wachay忙th忙]] || [[word:wachay忙j忙|wachay忙j忙]] || [[word:wachay忙sh忙|wachay忙sh忙]] || [[word:wachay忙|wachay忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wachayathath|wachayathath]] || [[word:wachayajaj|wachayajaj]] || [[word:wachayashash|wachayashash]] || [[word:wachay|wachay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wachayatha|wachayatha]] || [[word:wachayaja|wachayaja]] || [[word:wachayasha|wachayasha]] || [[word:wachaya|wachaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wachayafath|wachayafath]] || [[word:wachayafaj|wachayafaj]] || [[word:wachayafash|wachayafash]] || [[word:wachayaf|wachayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:wachayasha|wachayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gowachayasha|gowachayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiwachayasha|gokiwachayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:wachayn眉sha|wachayn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gowachaynkn眉sha|gowachaynkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiwachayn眉sha|gokiwachayn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wachaysh毛sha|wachaysh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowachaynksh毛sha|gowachaynksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwachaysh毛sha|gokiwachaysh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wachayrosha|wachayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowachaynkrosha|gowachaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwachayrosha|gokiwachayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wachaymusha|wachaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gowachaynkmusha|gowachaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwachaymusha|gokiwachaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:wachaysherasha|wachaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gowachaynksherasha|gowachaynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiwachaysherasha|gokiwachaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:wachayngasha|wachayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gowachaynkngasha|gowachaynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiwachayngasha|gokiwachayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wachayasha|wachayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gowachaynkyasha|gowachaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiwachayasha|gokiwachayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:wachayamasha|wachayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gowachaynkyamasha|gowachaynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiwachayamasha|gokiwachayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:wachayn眉sh毛sha|wachayn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowachaynkn眉sh毛sha|gowachaynkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwachayn眉sh毛sha|gokiwachayn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wachayn眉rosha|wachayn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowachaynkn眉rosha|gowachaynkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwachayn眉rosha|gokiwachayn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wachayn眉musha|wachayn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowachaynkn眉musha|gowachaynkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwachayn眉musha|gokiwachayn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:wachaysh毛n眉sha|wachaysh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowachaynksh毛n眉sha|gowachaynksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwachaysh毛n眉sha|gokiwachaysh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wachaysh毛rosha|wachaysh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowachaynksh毛rosha|gowachaynksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwachaysh毛rosha|gokiwachaysh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wachaysh毛musha|wachaysh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowachaynksh毛musha|gowachaynksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwachaysh毛musha|gokiwachaysh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:wachayron眉sha|wachayron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowachaynkron眉sha|gowachaynkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwachayron眉sha|gokiwachayron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:wachayrosh毛sha|wachayrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowachaynkrosh毛sha|gowachaynkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwachayrosh毛sha|gokiwachayrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wachayromusha|wachayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowachaynkromusha|gowachaynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwachayromusha|gokiwachayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:wachaymun眉sha|wachaymun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gowachaynkmun眉sha|gowachaynkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiwachaymun眉sha|gokiwachaymun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:wachaymush毛sha|wachaymush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gowachaynkmush毛sha|gowachaynkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiwachaymush毛sha|gokiwachaymush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:wachaymurosha|wachaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowachaynkmurosha|gowachaynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiwachaymurosha|gokiwachaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:wachay|wachay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:w忙ch忙y|w忙ch忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:howachay|howachay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:how忙ch忙y|how忙ch忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohowachay|hohowachay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohow忙ch忙y|hohow忙ch忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉wachay|n眉wachay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉w忙ch忙y|n眉w忙ch忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉wachay|n眉n眉wachay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉w忙ch忙y|n眉n眉w忙ch忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂wachay|n茂wachay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂w忙ch忙y|n茂w忙ch忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂wachay|n茂n茂wachay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂w忙ch忙y|n茂n茂w忙ch忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luwachay|luwachay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luw忙ch忙y|luw忙ch忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluwachay|luluwachay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluw忙ch忙y|luluw忙ch忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liwachay|liwachay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liw忙ch忙y|liw忙ch忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliwachay|liliwachay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliw忙ch忙y|liliw忙ch忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kowachay|kowachay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kow忙ch忙y|kow忙ch忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokowachay|kokowachay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokow忙ch忙y|kokow忙ch忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kewachay|kewachay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kew忙ch忙y|kew忙ch忙y]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekewachay|kekewachay]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekew忙ch忙y|kekew忙ch忙y]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
